purpose: Non-clinical lab support data. Plausibility checks and terminology metadata must stay separate from clinical reference intervals.

sources.caveat: Lightweight CodeSystem metadata only. It does not include the full LOINC term release.
notes: This CodeSystem file describes LOINC metadata fields and filters; it does not contain full LOINC terms.

sources.license: CC BY 4.0 / CC0 per source metadata; verify before app redistribution.
sources.caveat: LOINC-mapped eligibility-screening lab procedure metadata, not clinical normal ranges.
notes: Reduced to fields useful for search, aliases, units, and LOINC mapping.
No reference intervals are imported from ELaPro.
